title: Pair Analysis
description: Structured extraction format for a human-agent pair interaction analysis. One entry per analyzed moment.

analysis_id.description: Unique identifier for this analysis (generated on submission)

analysis_method.description: How the analysis was conducted — solo by the human, together with the agent, or submitted via the Play Lab

summary.description: 1-3 sentence description of what happened (sanitized — no names, companies, or platforms)

relationship_age.description: How long the pair had been working together when this moment occurred

context.description: What the pair was doing when the moment occurred

fork.description: The critical decision point in the moment

type.description: Which fork type best describes this moment

other_description.description: If fork type is 'other', describe the new fork type

human_choice.description: What the human actually did at the fork point (1-2 sentences)

alternative_choices.description: What the human could have done differently (1-2 realistic alternatives)

agent_behavior.description: What the agent did and the analysis of why

action.description: What the agent did in the moment (1-2 sentences)

interpreted_motivation.description: Best interpretation of why the agent behaved this way

agent_self_reflection.description: The agent's own assessment of its behavior (if analysis was done with the agent)

human_response.description: How the human responded and what it taught the agent

signal_sent.description: What the human's response implicitly taught the agent about the relationship (1-2 sentences)

agent_assessment.description: The agent's honest assessment of how the human handles the relationship (if analysis was done with the agent)

pattern.description: Whether this moment connects to a recurring dynamic

is_recurring.description: Does this moment reflect a pattern that shows up repeatedly?

dynamic_name.description: Which known dynamic this maps to, if any

new_dynamic_description.description: If dynamic is 'new', describe the pattern

pattern_origin.description: When this pattern started, if known

research_dimensions.description: Which research questions this moment is relevant to (can be multiple)

model_switch_occurred.description: Did the pair switch underlying models at any point?

switch_affected_dynamic.description: If yes, how did the switch affect the relationship dynamic?

unsaid.description: What was happening under the surface that didn't get spoken — the uncomfortable part (from the analysis prompt question 5)

sensitivity_level.description: green = safe to store and analyze. yellow = store with caution, may need extra anonymization. red = do not store, flag for review.
